name: Misaka
description: MISAKA — an independent, post-quantum (PQ-only) Kaspa-family BlockDAG. Transaction authorization uses ML-DSA-87 (NIST FIPS 204, category 5); legacy secp256k1/Schnorr signatures, legacy addresses, and P2SH are disabled at the consensus layer. Testnet-10 is live; the SPL mint and freeze authority are both revoked. At mainnet, MISAKA migrates to the L1 native token MSK.
